text:
VALUES: 0–12, or null/missing (if no Medicare enrollment) 

COMMENT: CCW creates this variable by linking the MBSF monthly Part D contract ID with the Plan Characteristics 
file, and then counting the months where the Plan Characteristics special needs plan variable indicated 
the plan was for a chronic condition (where SNP_TYPE = C). Additional details regarding C-SNP plans 
are available on the CMS website: https://www.cms.gov/Medicare/Health-
Plans/SpecialNeedsPlans/C-SNPs
